description:
Wind Power LLC sells an Annual Maintenance Contract to its customers. Green Energy Corp has just paid $1,200 upfront on January 1, 2026, for a full year of coverage. Since the company cannot legally recognize all $1,200 as income immediately, you must configure deferred revenue accounting.

Your tasks:
1. Create a new Item named 'Annual Maintenance Contract'. It should be a Service (non-stock). Enable Deferred Revenue on the item. Set its Deferred Revenue Account to 'Deferred Revenue - WP' and Default Income Account to 'Sales - WP'. Set No. of Months to 12.
2. Create and submit a Sales Invoice for 'Green Energy Corp' with a Posting Date of 2026-01-01. Add 1 'Annual Maintenance Contract' at $1,200.00. In the item row details, ensure Enable Deferred Revenue is checked, and set the Service Start Date to 2026-01-01 and Service End Date to 2026-12-31.
3. Run the 'Process Deferred Accounting' tool to recognize January's revenue. Create a new process for Type: Income, Start Date: 2026-01-01, End Date: 2026-01-31, and Posting Date: 2026-01-31. Save and submit it.

Log into ERPNext at http://localhost:8080 with credentials Administrator / admin.
